case_title: CENTERSTONE REALTY VS. THOMAS P. HIGGINS et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CENTERSTONE REALTY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HIGGINS, THOMAS P. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1715 MCALLISTER STREET, #305 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HIGGINS, THOMAS P.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTERSTONE REALTY AS TO DEFENDANT HIGGINS, THOMAS P. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HIGGINS, THOMAS P.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT HIGGINS, THOMAS P.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $36.67 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTERSTONE REALTY
